sections.paragraph:
m. straw as broken up by threshing, chaff. (Arab. تِبْنُ id. whence denom. تَبَنَ to give chaff for fodder, to sell straw. The origin is doubtful. But it is not improbable that תֶּבֶן is for תַּבְנֶה from the root בָּנָה, and that it denotes building material, compare Exo 5:7, seqq.; compare אֶבֶן and תִּבְנִי.) Job 21:18 Gen 24:25 Isa 11:7 65:25 .

Denom. מַתְבֵּן, and-
